MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EATON ELECTRICAL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; Naomi Fribourg, Esq. of Howard Rome Martin & Ridley LLP 650/365-7715 x221 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SQUARE D COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; John D. Knadler, Esq. of Kirkpatrick & Lockhart Preston Gates Ellis LLP 249-1083 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant shifted the burden of proof based on the special interrogatory responses of plaintiff. Plaintiff's opposition creates triable issues of fact based upon plaintiff's declaration and deposition, defendant's response to interrogatory 31 and the Cohen declaration.
Motion for summary adjudication as to punitive damages is granted. Defendant shifted the burden of proof based on interrogatory responses 23-26 and plaintiff presented no evidence of malice. As to the other causes of action, the motion is denied. Defendant failed to shift the burden of proof on the cause of action for false representation because there is no special interrogatory addressing that subject. As to the causes of action for negligence and strict liability, the issue is causation and triable issues of fact have been established by plaintiff. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
